advantages.title: Detailed Specifications

advantages.description: Customers compare several models side-by-side — and make purchase decisions more often.

advantages.title: Quick Launch
advantages.description: Describe your assortment — AI creates the electronics store structure in 5 minutes.

advantages.title: Warranty and Returns
advantages.description: Warranty and return policy block reduces objections and increases buyer trust.

how_it_works.title: Describe Your Assortment
how_it_works.description: Specify electronics categories — AI will create the structure with the right fields for specs.

how_it_works.title: Add Products
how_it_works.description: Upload photos, fill in specs and prices through a convenient editor.

how_it_works.title: Launch and Sell
how_it_works.description: Publish the store — customers will find the right gadget and order online.

faq.question: How do I add technical specifications to products?
faq.answer: Product cards have special fields for technical specifications of any electronics.

faq.question: Can I implement product comparison?
faq.answer: Yes, the comparison block is available for electronics and appliance stores on paid plans.

faq.question: How do I add installment or credit for purchase?
faq.answer: Connect partner installment services — integrations available in payment method settings.

faq.question: How do I manage product stock?
faq.answer: Manage stock in the editor — when stock reaches zero, the Buy button is automatically blocked.

faq.question: How much does an electronics store website cost?
faq.answer: Free plan to start. Unlimited catalog and advanced features on paid plans.

faq.question: Can I integrate the site with suppliers?
faq.answer: Yes, integration with supplier YML feeds is available for automatic price and stock updates.

cta_mid_subtitle: Customers search for gadgets online — be where they're looking.
cta_final_subtitle: Create an electronics store website for free on Promto.
